ogTitle: Gillum vs Gipsy Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gillum and Gipsy Point.
heading: Gillum vs Gipsy Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gillum, Victoria and Gipsy Point, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gipsy Point has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Gillum (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gillum or Gipsy Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gillum has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Gipsy Point scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gillum scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Gipsy Point scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gillum or Gipsy Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gipsy Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
